title: d2c Flow Walker Checkpoint
description: Resume artifact for /d2c-build-flow Phase 4a. Mirrors skills/d2c-build/SKILL.md §Phase 3.5a-c (.d2c-build-checkpoint.json). Written atomically (write-tmp + rename) at the end of every walker round so an interrupted flow can resume from where it left off without restarting the entire walker. The flow_graph_hash field anchors this checkpoint to a specific flow-graph.json — a hash mismatch on resume fires F-FLOW-WALKER-CHECKPOINT-STALE (auto-recover; ignore stale checkpoint and start fresh).

schema_version.description: Checkpoint artifact schema version. v1 only in MVP.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this checkpoint was first written. Resume re-uses the same value across saves; only the per-round fields advance.

flow_graph_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of flow-graph.json content at checkpoint creation time. Mismatch on resume = stale checkpoint (the user re-ran Phase 2a between sessions); fire F-FLOW-WALKER-CHECKPOINT-STALE.

current_host_index.description: 0-based index into the walker's host iteration order (declared order across pages[] non-overlay non-stepper-group entries followed by stepper_groups[*].steps[*]). On resume, the walker skips hosts already in rounds_completed[] and resumes at this index.

current_viewport.description: Which viewport the walker was processing for the current host when the checkpoint was last saved. Mobile only appears when the host has a mobile_variant; otherwise the checkpoint never advances past 'desktop' for that host.

current_round.description: 1-based round counter for the current host/viewport. Advances from 1 to MAX_ROUNDS (default 3). Resume re-runs round N — i.e. the snapshot from round N is the rollback target if the resumed round regresses.

rounds_completed.description: One entry per (host_node_id, viewport) tuple the walker has finished. Status enum mirrors audit.json: 'pass' (≥THRESHOLD), 'plateau' (≥80% with <1pp improvement), 'plateau-stop' (<80%), 'oscillation' (3-window converged), 'regression' (failed twice with revert), 'max_rounds_exhausted', 'skipped' (Figma export missing).

host_node_id.description: Figma node id of the host (page or stepper_step).

rounds.description: How many auto-fix rounds were spent on this host/viewport.

final_score.description: Last pixel-diff score (0-100). Null when status is 'skipped'.

score_history.description: Per-round scores (oldest first). Used by detectOscillation/detectPlateau on resume so the decision logic stays deterministic across runs.

files_touched.description: Absolute paths of every file the walker has edited. Lets a clean-cancel ('start fresh' on resume) restore from snapshots before discarding the checkpoint.

snapshot_dirs_by_host.description: Map of host_node_id to ordered list of snapshot directories created for that host (one per auto-fix round). Used during regression revert and during checkpoint resume to validate the snapshots still exist on disk.
